title: Northern Trust (NTRS) Q3 Earnings Lag Estimates, NII Dips Y/Y
text: A fall in NII, and the AUC and AUM balances hinder Northern Trust's (NTRS) Q3 earnings.

title: Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Northern Trust Corporation (NASDAQ:NTRS ) Q3 2023 Results Conference Call October 18, 2023 9:30 AM ET Company Participants Jennifer Childe - Director, IR Michael O'Grady - Chairman, CEO Jason Tyler - CFO Conference Call Participants Glenn Schorr - Evercore Michael Brown - KBW Alex Blostein - Goldman Sachs Brennan Hawken - UBS Ryan Kenny - Morgan Stanley Brian Bedell - Deutsche Bank Mike Mayo - Wells Fargo Gerard Cassidy - RBC Operator Good day, and welcome to the Northern Trust Corporation Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call. Today's conference is being recorded.

title: Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) Q3 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) Q3 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.49 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.50 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.80 per share a year ago.

title: Northern Trust posts smaller drop in Q3 profit on robust fee-based income
text: Asset and wealth manager Northern Trust on Wednesday posted a smaller-than-expected drop in third-quarter profit as a rise in fee-based income cushioned the hit from a drop in its interest income.

title: Northern Trust Corporation Reports Third Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Northern Trust Corporation has released its third quarter 2023 financial results. Results can be found at https://www.northerntrust.com/about-us/investor-relations as well as on the corporation's Current Report on Form 8-K filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on October 18, 2023, which is available on the SEC's website at https://www.sec.gov. title: Northern Trust Declares Quarterly Dividends on Common and Preferred Stock
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Northern Trust Corporation (Nasdaq: NTRS), holding company of The Northern Trust Company, has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.75 per share on its common stock ($1.66-2/3 par value), payable on January 1, 2024, to holders of record at 5:00 p.m., Chicago time, on December 8, 2023. Northern Trust Corporation also declared cash dividends of $293.75 per share of its Series E non-cumulative perpetual preferred stock (resulting in a distribution of $0.29375 per depos.

title: Northern Trust (NTRS) to Post Q3 Earnings: What to Expect?
text: Despite higher rates, Northern Trust (NTRS) is expected to have witnessed a decline in interest income in the third quarter of 2023 due to softer loan demand and higher funding costs.

title: Earnings Preview: Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) Q3 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Northern Trust Appointed Global Custodian by Abu Dhabi Pension Fund
text: ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates & LONDON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Northern Trust (Nasdaq: NTRS) announced today that it has been appointed by Abu Dhabi Pension Fund (ADPF) (effective 1 January 2024) to provide a suite of services, including global custody, alternative asset administration through Front Office Solutions, liquidity solutions, performance and risk analytics, and compliance monitoring. Abu Dhabi Pension Fund (ADPF) is a growing pool of sovereign sponsored pension assets in the Middle East.
